Stack's Bowers Galleries (& Ponterio) - January 2026 NYINC Auction, Lot 40022 — SICILY. Syracuse. Agathokles, 317-289 B.C. AR Tetradrachm (16.99 gms), ca. 317-310 B.C. NGC Ch EF, Strike: 4/5 Surface: 5/5. Fine Style.
HGC-2, 1348; BAR Issue-2. Obverse: Wreathed head of Arethousa l
sales.description:
SICILY. Syracuse. Agathokles, 317-289 B.C. AR Tetradrachm (16.99 gms), ca. 317-310 B.C. NGC Ch EF, Strike: 4/5 Surface: 5/5. Fine Style.
HGC-2, 1348; BAR Issue-2. Obverse: Wreathed head of Arethousa left; three dolphins around; monogram below neck; Reverse: Charioteer driving quadriga left; triskeles above, monogram in exergue. A beautiful, well-centered striking in fine Syracusan style. Rich gray cabinet tone with underlying luster throughout. With just a touch of wear on the high points, thi...

sales.title:
Stack's Bowers Galleries (& Ponterio) - January 2026 NYINC Auction, Lot 40023 — SICILY. Syracuse. Agathokles, 317-289 B.C. AR Tetradrachm (17.00 gms), ca. 310-306/5 B.C. NGC VF, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 4/5.
HGC-2, 1536; SNG ANS-679. Obverse: Head of Kore right, wearing wreath of gra
sales.description:
SICILY. Syracuse. Agathokles, 317-289 B.C. AR Tetradrachm (17.00 gms), ca. 310-306/5 B.C. NGC VF, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 4/5.
HGC-2, 1536; SNG ANS-679. Obverse: Head of Kore right, wearing wreath of grain ears and single-pendant earring; Reverse: Nike standing right, erecting trophy to right; triskeles to lower left. Well-centered and fully struck, with a gorgeous cabinet tone.

Estimate: 700 - 1000...
